en: On the eighth day Moses called Aaron and his sons and the elders of Israel,
zh: 到了第八天，摩西把亞倫和他的兒子，以及以色列的眾長老都召了來；

en: and he said to Aaron, "Take for yourself a bull calf for a sin offering and a ram for a burnt offering, both without blemish, and offer them before the LORD.
zh: 摩西對亞倫說：“你要取一頭公牛犢來作贖罪祭，一隻公綿羊作燔祭，兩樣都要沒有殘疾的；獻在耶和華的面前。

en: And say to the people of Israel, 'Take a male goat for a sin offering, and a calf and a lamb, both a year old without blemish, for a burnt offering,
zh: 你也要告訴以色列人：你們要取一隻公山羊作贖罪祭，又取一頭一歲的牛犢和一隻一歲的綿羊羔作燔祭，兩樣都要沒有殘疾的；

en: and an ox and a ram for peace offerings, to sacrifice before the LORD, and a grain offering mixed with oil, for today the LORD will appear to you.'"
zh: 又取一頭公牛和一隻公綿羊作平安祭，宰獻在耶和華面前；又取用油調和的素祭，因為今天耶和華要向你們顯現。”

en: And they brought what Moses commanded in front of the tent of meeting, and all the congregation drew near and stood before the LORD.
zh: 於是他們把摩西所吩咐的，帶到會幕前面；全體會眾都走近來，站在耶和華的面前。

en: And Moses said, "This is the thing that the LORD commanded you to do, that the glory of the LORD may appear to you."
zh: 摩西說：“這是耶和華吩咐你們的事，你們要照著行，耶和華的榮耀就要向你們顯現。”

en: Then Moses said to Aaron, "Draw near to the altar and offer your sin offering and your burnt offering and make atonement for yourself and for the people, and bring the offering of the people and make atonement for them, as the LORD has commanded."
zh: 然後摩西對亞倫說：“走到祭壇那裡，獻上你的贖罪祭和燔祭，為自己和人民贖罪；又獻上人民的供物，按著耶和華的吩咐，為他們贖罪。”

en: So Aaron drew near to the altar and killed the calf of the sin offering, which was for himself.
zh: 於是亞倫走近祭壇，宰殺那為自己獻的贖罪祭牛犢。

en: And the sons of Aaron presented the blood to him, and he dipped his finger in the blood and put it on the horns of the altar and poured out the blood at the base of the altar.
zh: 亞倫的兒子奉上血，他就把手指蘸在血裡，抹在祭壇的四角上，把剩下的血倒在祭壇腳那裡；

en: But the fat and the kidneys and the long lobe of the liver from the sin offering he burned on the altar, as the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 贖罪祭牲的脂肪、腎和肝葉，他都焚燒在祭壇上，都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: The flesh and the skin he burned up with fire outside the camp.
zh: 至於肉和皮，卻在營外用火燒掉。

en: Then he killed the burnt offering, and Aaron's sons handed him the blood, and he threw it against the sides of the altar.
zh: 亞倫宰殺了燔祭牲，他的兒子把血遞給他，潑在祭壇的周圍。

en: And they handed the burnt offering to him, piece by piece, and the head, and he burned them on the altar.
zh: 他們跟著把燔祭牲一塊一塊連頭遞給他，焚燒在祭壇上。

en: And he washed the entrails and the legs and burned them with the burnt offering on the altar.
zh: 亞倫又洗淨了內臟和腿，在祭壇的燔祭上焚燒。

en: Then he presented the people's offering and took the goat of the sin offering that was for the people and killed it and offered it as a sin offering, like the first one.
zh: 他把人民的供物獻上，又把那為人民作贖罪祭的公山羊牽來，宰殺了，獻為贖罪祭，和先前獻的一樣。

en: And he presented the burnt offering and offered it according to the rule.
zh: 然後他按著規則獻上燔祭，

en: And he presented the grain offering, took a handful of it, and burned it on the altar, besides the burnt offering of the morning.
zh: 又獻上素祭，從其中取了滿滿的一把，在祭壇上焚燒。這是在早晨的燔祭以外的。

en: Then he killed the ox and the ram, the sacrifice of peace offerings for the people. And Aaron's sons handed him the blood, and he threw it against the sides of the altar.
zh: 亞倫又宰殺了那為人民作平安祭的公牛和公綿羊；亞倫的兒子把血遞給他，潑在祭壇的周圍。

en: But the fat pieces of the ox and of the ram, the fat tail and that which covers the entrails and the kidneys and the long lobe of the liver-
zh: 他們又把公牛和公綿羊的脂肪、肥尾巴、遮蓋內臟的脂肪、兩個腎和肝葉，

en: they put the fat pieces on the breasts, and he burned the fat pieces on the altar,
zh: 都放在胸上，亞倫就把脂肪在祭壇上焚燒；

en: but the breasts and the right thigh Aaron waved for a wave offering before the LORD, as Moses commanded.
zh: 至於胸和右後腿，亞倫拿來作搖祭，在耶和華面前搖一搖；都是照著摩西吩咐的。

en: Then Aaron lifted up his hands toward the people and blessed them, and he came down from offering the sin offering and the burnt offering and the peace offerings.
zh: 亞倫向眾人舉起手，為他們祝福；他獻了贖罪祭、燔祭和平安祭，就下來。

en: And Moses and Aaron went into the tent of meeting, and when they came out they blessed the people, and the glory of the LORD appeared to all the people.
zh: 摩西和亞倫進了會幕，出來就為眾人祝福；耶和華的榮耀向眾民顯現。

en: And fire came out from before the LORD and consumed the burnt offering and the pieces of fat on the altar, and when all the people saw it, they shouted and fell on their faces.
zh: 有火從耶和華面前出來，燒盡了祭壇上的燔祭和脂肪；眾民看見了，就大聲歡呼，俯伏在地。
